name: Honey-Baked Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Discard giblets and neck of chicken (or save for stock).
2. Rinse chicken under cold, running water and pat dry. Set aside.
3. Coat a large nonstick skillet with Pam; place over medium-high heat until hot.
4. Add yellow squash, zucchini, onion, celery, and garlic to the skillet and sauté until tender-crisp. Drain excess fat if necessary.
5. Combine vegetable mixture, breadcrumbs, egg, pecans, salt, and pepper in a medium bowl; stir well.
6. Place chicken breast side up on a rack in a roasting pan coated with Pam.
7. Stuff the chicken lightly with the dressing mixture.
8. Truss the chicken (or place a ball of foil in the opening).
9. Combine apple juice and honey in a small bowl; stir well.
10. Brush the chicken with half of the apple-honey mixture.
11. Bake at 350°F for 1½-2 hours or until drumsticks are easy to move and juices run clear, basting occasionally with remaining apple-honey mixture.
